---
title: "Data Tables"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    echo: false
    css: styles/tables.css
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: load-data-table
source("../scripts/data-analysis.r")

analysis <- run_data_analysis()
```

The p value shown in each cell is the row-level Pearson chi-square p value comparing non-IBD, Crohn's disease, and ulcerative colitis for that outcome.

## Measures as Rows

```{r}
#| label: outcome-table
knitr::kable(
  analysis$display_table,
  align = c("l", "c", "c", "c")
)
```

## Patient Type as Rows

```{r}
#| label: patient-type-table
knitr::kable(
  analysis$patient_type_display_table,
  align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c")
)
```
